fields.name: Employee No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number for the employee.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: When you register a qualification for an employee, the program automatically enters a line number in the Line No. field to keep track of all the qualifications for the employee in the Employee Qualification table. The line number is specific to the particular qualification.

fields.name: Qualification Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a qualification code for the employee.

fields.name: From Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the employee started working on obtaining this qualification.

fields.name: To Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the employee is considered to have obtained this qualification.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies a type for the qualification, which specifies where the qualification was obtained.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the qualification.

fields.name: Institution/Company
fields.tooltip: Specifies the institution from which the employee obtained the qualification.

fields.name: Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of the qualification.

fields.name: Course Grade
fields.tooltip: Specifies the grade that the employee received for the course, specified by the qualification on this line.

fields.name: Employee Status
fields.tooltip: The program automatically fills in the field from the Status field on the employee card.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a comment was entered for this entry.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the qualification on this line expires.
